methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Climate & Energy (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 9 same-sector peers exist in Climate & Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

data.narrative:
Tandem PV is a Series A climate and energy company that has raised approximately $87M to date. The comparable universe in Climate & Energy includes one public company (Lnza) and eight private peers spanning fusion, battery recycling, solid-state batteries, mineral exploration, and green hydrogen. However, a narrow peer-median approach is not applicable here: while nine same-sector companies exist, none satisfy the filters for stage alignment, adjacent-stage proximity, or valuation-tier similarity simultaneously. The absence of three or more tightly comparable datapoints precludes reliable median-based valuation.

Given the constraint on traditional peer triangulation, alternative methods would be required to establish a defensible range. Revenue multiples, growth rates, or cash-burn profiles—if available across the peer set—might support bottom-up or comparative analysis. Similarly, venture-capital benchmarks for Series A deployment in deeptech and climate subsectors could anchor expectations around follow-on dilution and implied post-money valuations. However, these methodologies would require additional data not provided here.

Without sufficient narrow comparables or supplementary financial metrics, a specific valuation range cannot be derived from the current dataset. The key uncertainty is stage- and technology-specific pricing power: Series A deeptech companies in climate exhibit wide variance depending on IP maturity, pathway to commercialization, and capital intensity. Further analysis would benefit from revenue or unit-economics data on the top private peers and public-market valuations for Lnza.
